Bash(python -c "
import requests

API_KEY = 'ca6a99f3f0da4397a9fc9a31c5e0e4a9'

def obtener_datos_liga\(codigo\):
    datos = {}
    try:
        r = requests.get\(
            f'https://api.football-data.org/v4/competitions/{codigo}/standings',
            headers={'X-Auth-Token': API_KEY},
        \)
        r.raise_for_status\(\)
        for entrada in r.json\(\)['standings'][0]['table']:
            t = entrada['team']
            datos[t['name']] = {
                'puntos': entrada['points'],
                'pj':     entrada['playedGames'],
                'escudo': t['crest'],
            }
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'ERROR en {codigo}: {e}'\)
    return datos

targets_elc = ['Charlton Athletic FC', 'Wrexham AFC', 'Leicester City FC']
datos = obtener_datos_liga\('ELC'\)
print\(f'ELC keys count: {len\(datos\)}'\)
for t in targets_elc:
    print\(f'  {repr\(t\)}: {datos.get\(t\)}'\)

targets_pl = ['Chelsea FC', 'Liverpool FC', 'Manchester United FC']
datos_pl = obtener_datos_liga\('PL'\)
print\(f'PL keys count: {len\(datos_pl\)}'\)
for t in targets_pl:
    print\(f'  {repr\(t\)}: {datos_pl.get\(t\)}'\)
")

Bash(curl -s "https://api.football-data.org/v4/competitions/ELC/standings" -H "X-Auth-Token: ca6a99f3f0da4397a9fc9a31c5e0e4a9" | python -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
standings = data.get\('standings', []\)
print\(f'Total standings groups: {len\(standings\)}'\)
for i, s in enumerate\(standings\):
    print\(f'  [{i}] type={s.get\(\\"type\\"\)} season={s.get\(\\"season\\",{}\).get\(\\"id\\"\)} rows={len\(s.get\(\\"table\\",[]\)\)}'\)
")

    print\(j['nombre'] + ': bonus total = +' + str\(total_bonus\)\)
